name: Ana Pacheco-Navarro
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Pacheco-Navarro received her medical degree from Cornell Medical College, completed her internal medical residency at Massachusetts General Hospital, and attended pulmonary and critical care fellowship at Stanford. Her professional interests include quality improvement in the ICU and long-term outcomes after critical illness. In her free time, Dr. Pacheco-Navarro enjoys running, and reading.
education: Weill Cornell Medical College, New York, NY
fellowship: Stanford University School of Medicine, Stanford, CA
